top_signals.title: The U.S. Army Just Took a Historic Step to Break China's Rare Earth Dominance
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Army has placed REalloys at the center of America’s drive to rebuild its heavy rare earth supply chain, selecting the company to build and operate the first-ever commercial critical mineral processing operation on a U.S. military installation. REalloys plans to build a heavy rare earth processing complex at the Tooele Army Depot in Utah capable of refining dysprosium and terbium, two of the most strategically important rare earth elements used in high-temperature permanent magnets for defense systems. For the first time, commercial…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agents of change − speech by Sarah Breeden
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China fires ballistic missile into Pacific nuclear-free zone - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: China fires ballistic missile into Pacific nuclear-free zone  Financial Times

top_signals.title: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale may give BTC a ‘durable bottom,’ Grayscale says
top_signals.summary: “Investors are now more confident about the instrument,” said Grayscale’s Zach Pandl regarding STRC, which reclaimed $90 for the first time in three weeks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Yield Guild Games cuts 35 staff, shuts game publisher to focus on AI
top_signals.summary: Yield Guild Games said tough crypto and video game market conditions mean its YGG Play business is no longer commercially sustainable.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trader loses $2M in ‘same-block backrun extraction’ exploit
top_signals.summary: One crypto trader noted the $2 million loss could have been prevented had the victim read the transaction route before signing the transaction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Credit card payment processor Zentoshin gets nod to begin bankruptcy proceedings
top_signals.summary: The company provided a service that paid sales proceeds to credit card merchants before they received payments from credit card companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Molybdenum and the geopolitics of substitution
top_signals.summary: Molybdenum's price surge underscores critical mineral supply stress, tungsten risks, and rising strategic value in defense alloys.
